place_eye.title: Place the Black Eye in the End Portal frame — first slot filled

subtitle.text: Twelve slots. Two filled. Ten to go.

description: The End Portal frame accepts custom eyes in each of its 12 slots.
Each eye is distinct — the portal checks identity, not count.
You cannot use two Black Eyes. Each slot requires a different eye.
The Nether Eye is an anchor eye.
It drops from Nether Fortress chest loot — no boss fight required.
The Fortress chapter in the steam age (Ch06) is where you should have found it.
If you missed it, return to the Fortress now.
Ender Pearls are the scouting material for the remaining eleven.
Each one thrown is the portal asking if you know where you're going.
→ Place the Black Eye in the portal frame [check]
→ Collect 32 Ender Pearls (for scouting and Eye of Ender crafting)
→ Collect the Nether Eye from Nether Fortress loot [check]
